posts.text:
thank you joe manchin for wearing a suit while you voted against the child tax credit


Ursula Perano Helsel (@UrsulaPerano)

Manchin tells me he spoke to Fetterman today about the Senate dress code change

“I said ‘John, I think it’s wrong & there's no way I can comply with that’…Wanted to tell him directly that I totally oppose it & I will do everything I can to try to hold the decorum of the Senate”



— https://nitter.net/UrsulaPerano/status/1704204674771882215#m

posts.text: You know, it's funny. Earlier this week I had started to write a follow up to my "Fascism For First Time Founders" post that tried to explain to Silicon Valley how embracing fascists would destroy innovation... but now I need to spend the weekend rewriting the whole thing with a new Exhibit A.
